channel.title: Sketcha.day Daily Sketches
channel.description: One small drawing prompt and practical step-by-step sketch tutorial every day.

item.title: How to draw a tennis racket and ball
item.description: Learn how to draw a tennis racket and ball with a tilted racket head, handle wrap, string grid, tennis ball seam, soft shadow, and restrained colored-pencil detail.

item.title: How to draw a vintage roller skate
item.description: Learn how to draw a vintage roller skate with a high-top boot, sole plate, four wheels, front toe stop, laces, cuff seams, and soft graphite shading.

item.title: How to draw a pair of sunglasses on a towel
item.description: Learn how to draw a pair of sunglasses on a beach towel with rounded lenses, folded arms, towel stripes, fringe, dark lens shading, and soft pencil texture.

item.title: How to draw a dog at a desk
item.description: Learn how to draw a dog at a desk with a round head, floppy ears, simple face, front paws, pencil cup, pencils, and restrained warm pencil shading.

item.title: How to draw a little tugboat
item.description: Learn how to draw a little tugboat with a rounded hull, boxy cabin, short smokestack, round portholes, cabin windows, deck rail, water ripples, and restrained blue colored-pencil accents.

item.title: How to draw a garden watering can
item.description: Learn how to draw a garden watering can with a rounded can body, oval top rim, curved handle, long spout, sprinkler rose, water drops, flower decal, and teal colored-pencil shading.

item.title: How to draw a paint palette and brush
item.description: Learn how to draw a paint palette and brush with a tilted palette shape, thumb hole, diagonal brush, paint dabs, soft color, and sketchy shadow.

item.title: How to draw a stack of pancakes
item.description: Learn how to draw a stack of pancakes with three soft layers, a plate, butter, syrup drips, berries, crumb texture, and warm colored-pencil shading.

item.title: How to draw a birdhouse on a post
item.description: Learn how to draw a birdhouse on a post with a simple house body, pitched roof, round doorway, perch, wood planks, leaves, and colored-pencil shading.

item.title: How to draw a potted cactus with flowers
item.description: Learn how to draw a potted cactus with a rounded clay pot, gravel, a ribbed cactus body, side arms, pink flowers, spines, and colored-pencil shading.

item.title: How to draw a camping lantern
item.description: Learn how to draw a camping lantern with a rounded base, glass globe, crossed wire guard, vent cap, side supports, handle, and warm glow.

item.title: How to draw a patchwork kite in the wind
item.description: Learn how to draw a patchwork kite in the wind with a diamond body, fabric panels, a curving string, tail bows, clouds, and breeze lines.

item.title: How to draw a cozy teacup
item.description: Learn how to draw a cozy teacup with an oval rim, curved handle, saucer, steam, warm tea, and a red heart on the cup.

item.title: How to draw a garden snail on a leaf
item.description: Learn how to draw a garden snail on a leaf with five cumulative sketching steps.

item.title: How to draw a curious fox
item.description: Learn how to draw a curious fox with a seated pose, alert ears, fluffy tail, and simple pencil-and-color details.

item.title: How to draw a sleepy cat
item.description: Learn how to draw a sleepy curled-up cat in five simple, cumulative sketching steps.

item.title: How to draw a sprouting seed
item.description: Learn how to draw a young sprout with four simple leaves in five easy sketching steps.

item.title: How to draw a cozy mushroom
item.description: Learn how to draw a rounded mushroom with a sturdy stem in five approachable sketching steps.

item.title: How to draw a rainy-day frog
item.description: Learn how to draw a cartoon frog in rain boots holding an umbrella with five friendly sketching steps.

item.title: How to draw a glass of lemonade
item.description: Learn how to draw a glass of lemonade with a tapered clear glass, curved liquid line, bendy straw, lemon wheel, ice cubes, condensation dots, and soft yellow colored-pencil shading.

item.title: How to draw a soccer ball on grass
item.description: Learn how to draw a soccer ball on grass with a round outline, center pentagon, curved panel seams, dark patches, grass tufts, and simple pencil shading.

item.title: How to draw a seashell on sand
item.description: Learn how to draw a seashell on sand with a fan-shaped outline, scalloped outer edge, radiating ridges, small hinge, lower folds, pebbles, shadow, and restrained peach pencil shading.

item.title: How to draw a picnic basket
item.description: Learn how to draw a picnic basket with a rounded woven body, arched handle, folded cloth, small apple, and soft graphite shadow.

item.title: How to draw a stack of books
item.description: Learn how to draw a stack of books with three offset book blocks, page edges, a ribbon bookmark, worn cover bands, and soft graphite shading.

item.title: How to draw a pocket compass
item.description: Learn how to draw a pocket compass with a round case, inner face, diamond needle, top loop, small tick marks, and soft graphite shading.
